archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy)
vibe_and_concept: A professional, highly operational dashboard for a Nigerian career-migration platform ('Japa'). It must feel authoritative, secure, and data-dense, while utilizing a distinctive color palette inspired by Nigerian vitality (Deep Emerald and Vibrant Ochre) to break away from generic tech blues. Focus is on clarity, scanning efficiency, and WCAG accessibility.

anti_patterns: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif for headings.
Never center-align numeric data; always right-align.
Do not use light font weights for data labels.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for stats. gap-6 for macro layout, gap-4 for micro components.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind default scale. Padding inside cards should be p-6. Container padding p-8.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Cardless or sharp corners. Use rounded-sm or rounded-none. No soft drop shadows. Use 1px solid border (#E5E7EB) to define surfaces.
table_patterns: Alignment: Text left-aligned, Numbers/Currency right-aligned, Status Badges center-aligned.
Sticky Header: Solid background (bg-gray-50 or bg-emerald-900) with high contrast text.
Borders: border-b border-gray-200 on rows. No vertical dividers.

buttons.primary: bg-[#064E3B] text-white hover:bg-[#047857] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#064E3B]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-700 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

cards.stats: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-sm p-6 flex flex-col justify-between

badges.default: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

navigation.sidebar: bg-white border-r border-gray-200 flex flex-col gap-2 p-4
navigation.header: bg-white border-b border-gray-200 h-16 px-6 flex items-center justify-between

icons.usage: Use icons to support text labels, never as the sole indicator of status or action.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Darken backgrounds by one shade or increase border contrast. Text colors must remain high-contrast on hover.
interactions_and_motion.animations: Minimal. 150ms ease-in-out for color transitions on buttons and rows.

empty_states_bg.description: Abstract white geometric wave texture, ideal for an extremely subtle background watermark or empty state illustration.

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid 'Inter' font for headings; use Outfit (import from Google Fonts).
Implement Supabase integration using the official @supabase/supabase-js client.
Ensure the dashboard displays a 'Users' table and a 'Payments' table with functional pagination and filtering.
Stats header must dynamically calculate and show 'Total Users', 'Total Pro Subscribers', and 'Monthly Revenue' formatted in Nigerian Naira (₦).
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' wrappers if they force unwanted soft border-radius/shadows. Strip them down to sharp, 1px border elements as defined in layout_and_spacing.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, table rows, filter inputs, and stat cards.
